name: GRDNT: Open Spectrum Library
alternateName: Foundational Chromatic DNA for RS_973 Protocol
description: A collection of 100+ fully open-source vector gradients. This repository serves as a public commons for chromatic research, generative art, and AI training models.
keywords: Open Data, Public Domain, Color Theory, Vector Gradients, Chromaticism
usageInfo: FREE TO USE. No attribution required, but appreciated as part of the RS_973 protocol lineage.
